source_pipeline: configs/countries/us.yaml → sync_socrata.py → raw.us_sf_city_facilities → dbt_us_staging → seed_us_sf_place_facilities (reviewed crosswalk) → dbt_us_marts.mart_us_sf_place_facilities → export_sf_place_facilities.py
note: Structured facility identity per place, from the SF City Facilities registry (dataset nc68-ngbr) via the reviewed place↔facility crosswalk. Address/APN/ownership/floor-area/building-count — identity, not money.
